BRP.actualENCHint: ENC value adjusted for being worn, hit location etc
BRP.advSkillCatHint: Select the impact of each stat on the skill category modifier
BRP.ammoCapacityHint: Magazine size or maximum ammunition shown in Combat.
BRP.ammoModeCountHint: Combat rolls spend one from Quantity.
BRP.ammoModeHint: How this weapon tracks ammunition in Combat.
BRP.ammoModeMagazineHint: Combat rolls spend current ammo; reload fills current ammo from one spare magazine.
BRP.ammoModeNoneHint: Combat rolls do not spend ammunition.
BRP.ammoModeSingleHint: Combat rolls spend one from Current Ammo; reload is not used.
BRP.ammoQuantityCountHint: Inventory count. In Count mode, Combat rolls spend from this field.
BRP.ammoTypeHint: Optional ammunition label, such as arrows, bolts, shells, or rounds.
BRP.apHint: Use tooltip to see Ballistic Armor Points.   For rolling Random Armor Values click the formula, or shift+click to roll Ballistic Armor
BRP.armExpandHint: Click on 'Armor' to expand all hit locations or SHIFT+click to collapse
BRP.armBalHint: This armor will provide different protection to firearms
BRP.armHPLHint: This type of armor is not compatible with Hits Per Location rules
BRP.armourNoHitLoc: You must select an hit location for this armor
BRP.armourNotHPL: This armor is not compatible with Hits Per Location
BRP.armVarHint: The user can vary the amount of armor points - genereally used for Energy Shields
BRP.bapHint: Ballistic Armor Points - Armor vs Firearms
BRP.baseScoreHint: Select 'Fixed' for no rule in the relevant characterstic and multiple
BRP.baseStatHint: Choose the Stat (or None) that the Skill Cateogry Modifier is based off
BRP.basicHint: Starter skills will be automatically added to new characters if option activated
BRP.basicTraitHint: Starter traits will be automatically added to new characters if option activated and traits are used in game
BRP.bleedingHint: Your character is bleeding - depending on the location and severity of the wound they may have some time before loosing hit points
BRP.bonusHint: Number in brackets is the Mental category bonus.  This is not included in the total value
BRP.characterMovePlaceholderTooltip: Current system.move is empty; showing baseline placeholder.
BRP.factionSharedDefinitionHint: Use Description and GM Notes for faction details. Character-specific membership data will live on the actor.
BRP.charHint: Click the characteristic score for a normal roll (SHIFT + click to roll average difficulty/no mods), CTRL + click for a resistance roll, ALT + click for POW v POW roll.
BRP.chooseHitLoc: Please choose the hit location for this armor
BRP.chosenHint: Toggle this on if you have selected a specialism for the skill
BRP.combatSkillHint: Will appear as a weapon skill when toggled on
BRP.dailyHP: Damage taken towards next minor wound = {value}
BRP.damagePrompt: Please enter the amount of damage taken
BRP.deadHint: Your character has died from a single massive blow to the head, chest or abdomen
BRP.deleteConfirm: Please confirm you want to proceed with deletion.
BRP.diffValHint: Enter the difficulty mutliplier e.g 2 for 2 * skill chance or 2 * characteristic
BRP.dupItem: Can not add this item as it already exists on the sheet
BRP.effectsNoMatches: No effects match the current filter.
BRP.energyHint: Current Energy Points and Maximum Energy Points
BRP.equipStatusHint: Toggle the item to move between Carried, Worn, Packed and Stored
BRP.capacityEncHint: Maximum ENC this container can hold.
BRP.containerIdHint: ID of the container currently holding this item. Leave blank for top-level inventory.
BRP.inventoryCurrencyInvalidAmount: Enter a currency amount of 0 or more.
BRP.encReductionPctHint: Percent reduction applied to contents when this container is carried.
BRP.inventoryBonusEditorHint: Bonuses are stored on the item and displayed in inventory; they do not affect rolls yet.
BRP.inventoryBonusRequiresCarried: Requires this item to be carried.
BRP.inventoryDropCycle: Container drops cannot create a cycle.
BRP.inventoryDropInvalid: This inventory drop is not valid.
BRP.inventoryDropWrongParent: Use a container drop zone to move between containers.
BRP.inventoryDropWrongSection: This item belongs to another inventory section.
BRP.errorCardInvalid: This Card Type is not recognised
BRP.errorRollInvalid: This Roll Type is not recognised
BRP.generalHPHint: Enter general damage, it will automatically be entered as a negative value
BRP.groupHint: A group of skills for professions and personalities
BRP.handCrewHint: Hands needed for all weapons, except Artillery which is number of crew
BRP.head: Head
BRP.healPrompt: Please enter the amount of damage healed
BRP.healthSilhouetteLegendHealth: Color shows remaining HP by body location
BRP.healthSilhouetteLegendArmor: Color shows worn armor value by body location

BRP.healthUnmatchedLocations: {count} locations are available in the list only
BRP.hitLocFractionHint: Enter 3 for 1/3, 4 for 1/4, 5 for 1/5, 10 for 1/10 and 2.5 for 2/5
BRP.hitLocTypeHint: Use limb for arms, legs, wings.  General is for non-locational damage
BRP.hpApHint: {label} for all weapons, except AP for Shields
BRP.hpAdjHint: Adjust the {label} in hit location, use a negative number to reduce.  Does not impact total {label}
BRP.impactHint: Amount of damage or healing depending on the spell
BRP.improveScore: Total score without effects or category bonuses
BRP.incapacitatedHint: Your character is incapacitated and can no longer fight.  If this is a limb you may try to heal yourself, if a chest wound you can not perform any actions.
BRP.initError: The Initiative Formula '{formula}' in game settings is not valid.  The default of DEX is being used
BRP.initModError: Initiative modifier of '{modifier}' is not valid and has been ignored
BRP.injuredHint: The limb is temporarily useless.  If a leg or abdomen wound your character falls prone, if an arm you drop anything held and not attached.
BRP.injuredHPL: Injured limb = unusable, injured abdomen = can't use legs, injured head/chest = incapacitated
BRP.keyHint: Keywords are used to allow coding of impacts of the skill/item etc
BRP.levelHint: This is the level of the spell, or the maximum level for a variable spell
BRP.lock: Click to lock/unlock the actor sheet
BRP.locTypeHint: Body locations result in death if there's 3 times the max HP, otherwise it's a limb and is severed in these circumstances
BRP.magazineCountHint: Spare magazines available for reload actions.
BRP.memHint: Spell is memorised when book is a solid colour
BRP.minorOnlyHint: This mutation is limited to minor power only
BRP.name: Name
BRP.needPower: You can't add this item without the relevant power
BRP.noAlleg: Allegiances are not allowed - see the game settings
BRP.noDirectDrop: This item can not be dropped directly on the character sheet
BRP.noHPL: You can not add this Hit Location as Hits Per Location not used - see the game settings
BRP.noPassion: Passions are not allowed - see the game settings
BRP.noPersTrait: Personality Traits are not allowed - see the game settings
BRP.noRep: Reputations are not allowed - see the game settings
BRP.noSkillCat: Skill category '{skillCat}' does not exist. Please check skill '{skillName}'.
BRP.nopower: This power is not allowed - see the game settings
BRP.noXPHint: Successfully using this skill does not grant an XP check
BRP.oneRep: The game settings only allow one Reputation item on the character
BRP.perLvlHint: CP reward is multiplied by superpower level if active
BRP.persEmptyPassions: No passions yet. Click + to add one.
BRP.persEmptyTraits: No personality traits yet. Click + to add a pair.
BRP.persFocusLinkHint: Focus text remains visible even if the linked document is missing.
BRP.persFocusLinkUnavailable: Linked focus options need an embedded actor item.
BRP.persLinkedFocusMissing: Linked focus could not be found.
BRP.persPairImpCheckHint: This single checkbox represents the entire trait pair. Legacy opposed checks are read but no longer edited separately.
BRP.ppCostHint: Total {label} to cast the current/memorised level of the spell
BRP.ppplHint: {label} cost per level of the spell, power etc
BRP.radiusHint: Damage is reduced by 1D6 for each radius from the blast point
BRP.rangePsyHint: Range is multiplied by users POW
BRP.reputationHint: This is a general reputation score
BRP.resetHitLoc: Reset Current HP to Max HP
BRP.resolveMax: Maximum rolls added, please resolve the card

BRP.restoreAll: Double click to restore all points
BRP.scoreExcHint: This percentage excludes the category bonus
BRP.scoreIncHint: This percentage includes the category bonus
BRP.selectPower: Please select the type of power
BRP.skillHint: Click the score for a normal roll (SHIFT + click to roll average difficulty/no mods), CTRL + click for an oppossed roll, ALT + click for a combined roll, or CTRL + ALT + click for a Cooperative Roll.
BRP.skillModHint: Penalty to Manipulation/Perception/Physical/both Hide & Stealth skills
BRP.specGroupHint: When used via an Optional Skill Group in a Profession or Personality this will let you select one of all skills in the Skill Category
BRP.specialismHint: There are specialism of this skill - change the skill name to reflect the specialism
BRP.spellCost: This is the permanent POW cost in addition to the power/magic point cost
BRP.spellLvlHint: Number if parenthesis is level of spell memorised where this is a variable level spell
BRP.stopGroupSkill: You can not add a Group Skill to the sheet
BRP.storedPower:
Double Click to restore all points.

Current/Maximum Stored {label}:

BRP.storyQuestLinksManagedHint: Linked references currently stored: {count}. Full editing will move to the Story tab flow.

Settings.actorBackColourHint: Actor Character sheet main background colour
Settings.actorBRPIDHint: Automatically add BRPID to actors (characters and NPCs) when created
Settings.actorFontColourHint: Colour for most of the text etc on the actor/item sheets

Settings.actorTabNameShadowColourHint: Colour of the shadow when hovering on the Character Sheet Tab bar
Settings.actorTertiaryColourHint: Colour for the calculated values (e.g. Current and Max Hit Points, Stats Totals) on actor/item sheets
Settings.actorTitleColourHint: Colour for the titles (e.g. Personal, Hit Points, Skill Categories) on the actor/item sheets
Settings.allowImpHint: Allow Impossible Rolls, which only succeed on a roll of 01
Settings.autoXPHint: Set when to automatically tick XP check

Settings.charSheetLogoHint: Select the logo to sit at the centre top of the character sheet

Settings.defaultTabHint: Default Items to the Description Tab
Settings.diffValueHint: Enter the difficulty multiplier of rolls rather than selecting a level
Settings.firstAidBRPIDHint: Enter the BRPID for the First Aid Skill
Settings.fpLabelLongHint: Enter an alternative label for Fatigue Points
Settings.fpLabelShortHint: Enter an abbreviation for the alternative Fatigue Point Label
Settings.hpLabelLongHint: Enter an alternative label for Hit Points
Settings.hpLabelShortHint: Enter an abbreviation for the alternative Hit Point Label
Settings.hpModHint: For Characters: 1 = default, 1.5 increases HP by 50%, 2 = Double
Settings.initRoundHint: Reroll initiative every combat round - no, manually or automatically
Settings.initStatHint: Choose the stat that the initiative is based off (used Fixed for no stat)
Settings.itemBRPIDHint: Automatically add BRPID to items when created

Settings.mutationLabelHint: Title to replace the mutation tab name on the character sheet
Settings.powerRulesHint: Configure rules for which Powers used
Settings.ppLabelLongHint: Enter an alternative label for Power Points
Settings.ppLabelShortHint: Enter an abbreviation for the alternative Power Point Label
Settings.psychicLabelHint: Title to replace the psychic tab name on the character sheet
Settings.quickCombatHint: Allow quick combat rolls when SHIFT key pressed
Settings.res5LabelLongHint: Enter a label for the Custom Resource
Settings.res5LabelShortHint: Enter an abbreviation for the Custom Resource Label
Settings.resistLevelsHint: When active resistance rolls can be critical, special and fumbles
Settings.resistRollHint: When active there is always a 1% chance of success or failure
Settings.sanLabelLongHint: Enter an alternative label for Sanity

Settings.sanLabelShortHint: Enter an abbreviation for the alternative Sanity Label
Settings.secBackColourHint: Character sheet heading and tab bar colour
Settings.skillBonusHint: Select no bonus, simple (prime characteristic) calc or advanced method
Settings.sorceryLabelHint: Title to replace the sorcery tab name on the character sheet
Settings.starterSkillsHint: Add starter skills to new characters on creation
Settings.starterTraitsHint: Add starter traits to new characters on creation
Settings.superLabelHint: Title to replace the superpower tab name on the character sheet
Settings.switchShiftHint: When on this causes check rolls to default to no dialogue box.
Settings.tokenDropModeHint: Define the default behavior when an NPC with rollable characteristics.
Settings.tokenDropNameHint: Define whether the NPC name is shown on the token
Settings.tokenDropBarsHint: Define whether the NPC resource bars are shown on the token
Settings.useAVRandHint: Uses random armor values (e.g. 1D6 instead of fixed value)
Settings.useEDUHint: Characters will have an EDU characteristic
Settings.useFPHint: Characters will have a Fatigue Points score
Settings.useHPLHint: Tick this to use Hits Per Location
Settings.useMagicHint: Tick this to allow characters to have Magic spells
Settings.useMutationHint: Tick this to allow characters to have Mutations
Settings.usePassionHint: Tick this to allow characters to have Passions
Settings.usePersTraitHint: Tick this to allow characters to have Personality Traits
Settings.usePsychicHint: Tick this to allow characters to have Pyschic powers
Settings.useReputationHint: Select no reputation, single reputation or multiple reputation scores
Settings.useRes5Hint: Characters will have a Custom Resource
Settings.useSANHint: Characters will have a SAN score
Settings.useSorceryHint: Tick this to allow characters to have Sorcery spells
Settings.useSuperHint: Tick this to allow characters to have Super-powers
Settings.useWealthHint: Use Wealth ratings rather than a cash value
Settings.wealthLabelHint: Name of currency used in game
Settings.xpFixedHint: Fixed increase when an XP improvement succeeds

Settings.xpRollDiceHint: Show XP & POW improvement dice rolls if you have Dice So Nice
